result:
@hewn v0 hybrid
G: fix_memory_leak_in_long_running_nodejs_process
C: process_rss_grows_unbounded ∧ gc_not_reclaiming ∧ suspected_retained_references
P: run_with("--inspect") ∧ capture_heap_snapshots_at_intervals ∧ diff_snapshots_in_chrome_devtools ∧ identify_retainer_paths ∧ check_common_culprits("listeners,timers,closures,caches,globals") ∧ remove_unbounded_growth ∧ bound_caches_with_lru ∧ call_off_on_emitters ∧ clear_intervals_on_shutdown
V: rss_stable_over_time ∧ heap_used_plateaus_after_gc ∧ snapshot_diff_shows_no_growing_retainers ∧ load_test_sustains_without_oom
A: use("clinic.js_or_heapdump") ∧ set("--max-old-space-size") ∧ enable("trace_warnings_for_maxlisteners") ∧ monitor("process.memoryUsage")
